function.description: This is the syntax to establish (set up) a function in nasm.

newline.description: This is a snippet for printing a newline in nasm

printHello.description: An exaple program of Netwide Assembler language.

section.description:
Make a section in nasm
mov section <section>

The start of an assembly program.description: Automatically build the basical start of nasm language

jge.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is greater than or equal to the target value

jmp.description: Jump to a label without any conditions

jne.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is not equal to the target value

je.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is equal to the target value

jle.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is lower than or equal to the target value

jg.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is greater than the target value

jl.description: Jump to a label if in cmp, the previous label is lower than the target value
